_comment: Watch fail-closed permission posture (docs/always-on-agent-research.md §3.2). Deploys to /Users/jefe/watch/.claude/settings.json. defaultMode=dontAsk: auto-DENY anything not explicitly allowed (the valid fail-closed mode; 'deny' is NOT a valid mode and would make Claude Code reject this whole file). allow is EMPTY on purpose: the PreToolUse dispatch-gate hook is the SOLE allow-er of the two read wrappers and the SOLE ask-er of a valid mxr dispatch (a deny rule would override the hook's ask, so we keep NO Bash deny). NOTE: under dontAsk the built-in Read/Grep/Glob tools are auto-allowed, so the Read() secret-denies below are load-bearing, not belt; ~/ form is filesystem-correct (a single-slash /Users/... would be settings-relative and miss). Residual (accepted, matches curator): Read on non-secret paths stays available; CLAUDE.md instructs reading only via read-inbox. Edit the hook path if the checkout is elsewhere.
